query:
-- 1. Total registered users
SELECT 'total_users' AS metric, COUNT(*) AS value FROM users
UNION ALL
-- 2. Users with duplicate names
SELECT 'duplicate_names', COUNT(*) FROM (
  SELECT name, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users GROUP BY name HAVING cnt > 1
) dup
UNION ALL
-- 3. Users with NULL or empty names
SELECT 'null_empty_names', COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE name IS NULL OR name = ''
UNION ALL
-- 4. Users with puzzle attempts
SELECT 'users_with_attempts', COUNT(DISTINCT userId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
-- 5. Guest devices with attempts
SELECT 'guest_devices', COUNT(DISTINCT deviceId) FROM puzzle_attempts WHERE userId IS NULL AND deviceId IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
-- 6. Total puzzle attempts
SELECT 'total_attempts', COUNT(*) FROM puzzle_attempts
UNION ALL
-- 7. Correct attempts
SELECT 'correct_attempts', SUM(isCorrect) FROM puzzle_attempts
UNION ALL
-- 8. Cycle history entries
SELECT 'cycle_history_entries', COUNT(*) FROM cycle_history;
